title: fix(sirius): responsive Lottie backgrounds for pollinations.ai
author: ChunkyPanda29

gist.headline: Responsive elevator rides
gist.blurb: The Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge just got a responsive tune-up. Lottie animated backgrounds now scale perfectly whether you're on desktop or mobile.
gist.summary: Fixed a CSS bug in the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge app where Lottie animations were not resizing dynamically with the browser window.
gist.impact: Players will now experience perfectly scaled animated backgrounds across all devices and screen sizes.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes responsive scaling for Lottie animations in an elevator-themed app. Visual symbols: an elevator, resizing/scaling frames, animations. Characters: Polly the bee adjusting a frame or window.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute 8-bit bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, adjusting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) picture frame inside a retro elevator. The frame is magically stretching to fit the wall. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
